spec.name: The Muddy Sewer Pipe
spec.description: You have entered a kind of tube intersection that leads south, west and east. Your legs are covered in mud up to the knees. REAL yucky!

east.description: East. There is less mud in that direction, or that's your impression.

south.description: That way is lost in darkness, though you sense less mud in that direction, perhaps even a complete end to this sludge that surrounds you.

west.description: West. The mud reaches that way too, all the way up the walls.

extra_descs.description: It is as dark as tar and looks like something out of a toilet, on top of that, the smell is absolutely overwhelming.
